channel.title: Open-Source on My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content in Open-Source on My New Hugo Project

item.title: V1t CTF 2025
item.description:
Idea

Honestly, there wasn’t any fancy or romantic reason behind it. It was just a random thought like:
“Why don’t I create a v1t CTF about ducks?”
And then my brain went: fuck it, I’m gonna do it anyway.

Getting Started

Things were actually pretty hard at the beginning because I had never asked for sponsorship before, so I had zero experience. I started by googling “CTF sponsorship” and reached out to Google CTF first — and of course, they rejected us immediately. Their reply email was even kinda sarcastic.

item.title: VishwaCTF 2025 and how we meet FazeCT
item.description:
I took FazeCT pfp on dream hack ;-;

Getting Started

I’m a CTF beginner. I had only been playing CTFs for about 2–3 weeks, and honestly my results weren’t very good. Part of the reason was that I didn’t spend much time on CTFs. So that day, I decided to ask myself: what would happen if I seriously sat down and played one full CTF? And that CTF was VishwaCTF 2025.
